title: QR Code Payment Use Cases
excerpt: QR codes can be used to pull up a menu at your favorite restaurant. But how are QR codes used for payments? They can be used by consumers to pay at POS, to pay billers and everybody in between.
body:
QR codes can be used to pull up a menu at your favorite restaurant. But how are QR codes used for payments? They can be used by consumers to pay at POS, to pay billers and everybody in between. All that's needed is a mobile device. No checks, no plastic, not even a phone number is needed.

![QR Code Use Cases](https://d2lq74zxbg4jiz.cloudfront.net/QR_Code_Use_Cases_1_a79084a85c.webp)
